title: Exclusive: VR Neelakantan exits Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas with two partners to join Khaitan & Co
description: VR Neelakantan, who has spent close to two decades at Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas (SAM), has resigned to join Khaitan & Co.He will join Khaitan's Projects and Project Finance practice along with partners Prashant Sirohi and Mrinal Sharma.Confirming the move, Khaitan & Co Executive Director – Human Resources Amar Sinhji told Bar & Bench,"Yes, VR Neelakantan, Prashant Sirohi and Mrinal Sharma will be joining our firm as Partners in our Projects and Project Finance practice.
